fields.description: The 0-based index of the Arbor Process Stage this run-stage mirrors (its fill sequence).
fields.label: Stage Idx

fields.description: The stage's Tree Column, denormalized for the timestamp ledger.
fields.label: Column

fields.description: When the run entered this stage (SLA clock start).
fields.label: Entered At

fields.description: When this stage's column was filled (advancing the run); null until filled.
fields.label: Filled At

fields.description: entered_at + stage SLA; null when the stage has no SLA.
fields.label: Due At

fields.description: Set by the SLA sweep when now > due_at and the stage is not yet filled.
fields.label: Breached

fields.description: Idempotency guard for the stage-enter notification (records the notified owner identity/marker so a replay does not re-notify).
fields.label: Notified Owner
